title: EDEN variant
description: One completed (or in-flight) attempt to improve the experiment's objective. The evaluation object's shape is constrained by the experiment's evaluation_schema; this schema does not itself constrain key/value types, since those vary per experiment.

kind.description: Variant classifier. Absent (the default) for ordinary executor-produced variants. 'baseline' marks the experiment seed elevated to a first-class variant (spec/v0/02-data-model.md §9.4); a baseline MAY omit idea_id.

branch.description: Worker branch under work/*; present once the executor starts.

commit_sha.description: Worker-branch tip; present once the executor completes.

variant_commit_sha.description: Canonical-lineage SHA on variant/*; set only by the integrator.

artifacts_uri.description: Where the variant's evaluator-produced artifacts live; written by the orchestrator from the evaluator submission's artifacts_uri (spec/v0/03-roles.md §4.4).

executor_artifacts_uri.description: Where the variant's executor-produced artifacts live; written by the orchestrator from the executor submission's artifacts_uri (spec/v0/03-roles.md §3.4). Disjoint from artifacts_uri (which is evaluator-written).

evaluation.description: Evaluation payload; keys MUST be a subset of the experiment's declared evaluation_schema and values MUST match the declared types (or be null).

executed_by.description: worker_id of the executor that produced this variant; written at execution-task submit time (spec/v0/02-data-model.md §1.6).

evaluated_by.description: worker_id of the evaluator whose evaluation was committed; written at evaluation-task submit time (spec/v0/02-data-model.md §1.6).

allOf.description: idea_id is required for every variant except a kind=='baseline' variant (the seed has no producing idea; spec/v0/02-data-model.md §9.4 / §10 invariant 2).
